title: Raw qPCR gene expression datasets associated with fourth-generation CAR T-cell therapy targeting CD133 and integrin αvβ6 in cholangiocarcinoma xenograft models
author: Plengsuriyakarn, Tullayakorn
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This repository contains raw quantitative real-time PCR (qPCR) datasets generated from cholangiocarcinoma xenograft tissues following treatment with fourth-generation CAR T cells targeting CD133 and integrin αvβ6. 
 The dataset includes raw Ct values, absolute copy number quantification data, GAPDH-normalized expression values, metadata, and statistical summary data for VEGF, MMP9, COX-2, PGE2, TGF-β, TNF-α, IL-6, and IL-10 expression analyses. 
 Experimental model: BALB/c nude mice bearing KKU-213A cholangiocarcinoma xenografts. 
 The repository supports the findings reported in the associated manuscript submitted to Scientific Reports.
